improvement_bullets: Optimized data engineering workflows by implementing automated loading patterns in Snowflake, ensuring scalable and high-performance data ingestion for downstream reporting.
Engineered Python scripts to process ESG-related datasets, applying data cleaning and validation logic to ensure compliance and accuracy for sustainability reporting initiatives.
Utilized advanced Snowflake features, including Time Travel and Cloning, to streamline data management and maintain high availability of analytical environments.

Collaborated with investment and operations stakeholders to translate business requirements into automated data models, bridging the gap between technical infrastructure and front-office decision-making.
Developed robust data quality frameworks using Python to monitor and report on data integrity, mirroring the rigor required for high-stakes financial and sustainability data environments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Junior Python Developer (Data & Sustainability Engineering) opportunity with Micasa Global. I am interested in this opportunity because of the unique intersection of robust data engineering and sustainability, a field where I am eager to apply my technical background to drive environmentally conscious business solutions. What interests me about working for Micasa Global is its approach to sustainable data-driven operations; the firm's commitment to integrating ESG metrics into core investment strategy inspires me because it mirrors my own passion for using data as a catalyst for positive, measurable change. I believe my expertise in Python-based ETL development and my proficiency in advanced SQL would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing scalability and data integrity. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our reporting infrastructure and engineered an automated ETL pipeline that reduced processing time by 40%. By replacing manual spreadsheet workflows with automated Python and SQL scripts, I empowered executive stakeholders with real-time, accurate dashboards that directly informed our customer acquisition strategy. Ultimately, I know that the Junior Python Developer (Data & Sustainability Engineering) role at Micasa Global would allow me to bring my passion for automated data architecture to your core sustainability initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data management skills within a regulated, high-stakes environment. I collaborated with underwriting and product teams to integrate disparate insurance data sources, using advanced SQL window functions and CTEs to clean and reconcile complex datasets. This initiative reduced project delivery delays by 25% and ensured that our data structures remained reliable for our engineering teams. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in building end-to-end data pipelines in working on complex ESG-related challenges at Micasa Global. I know that my technical precision and ability to bridge the gap between complex data and stakeholder needs align with what it takes to succeed at the Junior Python Developer (Data & Sustainability Engineering) role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
